understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, matching your carried piece's shape, color, and rotation to predefined goal cells. Completing all goal cells in a level advances to the next; completing all levels wins the game. You must manage stamina, and losing all stamina costs a life; losing all lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You move in four directions (north, south, east, west). Each move consumes 1 stamina. The grid contains modifier tiles: shape mod cycles the piece's shape, color mod cycles its color, and rotation mod rotates it 90° clockwise. Goals require specific combinations of shape, color, and rotation. Stepping onto a goal cell when all attributes match completes it. Walls block movement. Losing all stamina resets you with one less life.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, matching your carried piece's shape, color, and rotation to predefined goal cells. Completing all goal cells in a level advances to the next; completing all levels wins the game. You must manage stamina, and losing all stamina costs a life; losing all lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You move in four directions (north, south, east, west). Each move consumes 1 stamina. The grid contains modifier tiles: shape mod cycles the piece's shape, color mod cycles its color, and rotation mod rotates it 90° clockwise. Goals require specific combinations of shape, color, and rotation. Stepping onto a goal cell when all attributes match completes it. Walls block movement. Losing all stamina resets you with one less life.
